topic.what: Cluster Segregation Concealment (CSC) defense that identifies poisoned samples via early-epoch feature clustering and eliminates backdoors through virtual-class relabeling
topic.how: Trains model with standard supervised learning while segregating poisoned samples via DBSCAN clustering on early-epoch latent features, then retraining classifier with relabeled poisoned samples assigned to virtual class
topic.why_matters: Existing poison restraint defenses suffer from inadequate detection against attack variants and compromise model utility via unlearning causing accuracy degradation

characteristics.what_it_measures: Percentage of triggered inputs misclassified as target label
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 shows ASR reduction from ~96-100% baseline to near-zero across all datasets
characteristics.context: Evaluated against 12 attack methods including BadNets, Trojan, Blend, SIG, CL, WaNet, ABS, IAB, Adap-Blend, SSBA

characteristics.what_it_measures: Classification performance on clean test set
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 shows ACC preservation with minimal degradation across datasets
characteristics.context: Outperforms 9 SOTA defenses on ACC while achieving lowest ASR

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of detected samples that are genuinely poisoned
characteristics.evidence: Table 3 shows CSC precision exceeding 98% vs baselines under 62%
characteristics.context: Precision for poisoned sample segregation across 10 attacks on CIFAR-10

characteristics.what_it_measures: Fraction of all poisoned samples successfully identified
characteristics.vs_baseline: ABL achieves 0.2-85.4%, NONE achieves 0.2-100% but with low precision
characteristics.evidence: Table 3 shows CSC recall above 94% vs baselines with limited coverage
characteristics.context: Recall for poisoned sample segregation across 10 attacks on CIFAR-10

characteristics.what_it_measures: Additional computation time vs undefended training
characteristics.value: 35.21 min vs 29.31 min undefended (5.9 min overhead)
characteristics.evidence: Figure 3 shows CSC comparable to NAD, ABL, CBD while significantly faster than six other defenses
characteristics.context: Time consumption for BadNets defense on CIFAR-10 dataset

characteristics.what_it_measures: Classification accuracy improvement over unlearning-based removal
characteristics.value: +12.96% to +46.12% improvement over unlearning across attacks
characteristics.evidence: Table 4 shows BC (CSC's concealment) achieves 95.41% ACC vs 82.45% for unlearning
characteristics.context: Backdoor concealment analysis comparing BC vs unlearning, U.R., and Mix CE methods

novelty: DBSCAN-based poisoned sample detection via early-epoch latent feature clustering
Virtual class relabeling for backdoor concealment replacing unlearning
Cluster segregation mechanism exploiting poisoned sample isolation patterns
Cross-epoch aggregated detection for robust poisoned sample identification
open_problems: Extension to dynamic or streaming data scenarios
Scalability to larger architectures beyond ResNet-18
Robustness against adaptive adversaries with known defense knowledge
Theoretical analysis of cluster formation conditions for poisoned samples
